title: UltraLight
description: The Modpack for any PC, even a potato-grade PC can run this!
body:
🔷 UltraLight – Optimized Minecraft With Built-in Shaders
Minecraft Versions Supported: 1.20.1 to 1.21.x
Modloader: Fabric
Style: Performance + Visuals
Mods Included: 16 handpicked lightweight enhancements
Pre-installed Shader Support: ✅

UltraLight is a lightweight optimization modpack that boosts your Minecraft FPS while keeping the game visually stunning — yes, shaders included by default.

Whether you're running on a potato or just hate lag, UltraLight gives you blazing-fast performance, clean visuals, and zero fluff. It's the perfect base for casual play, long-term survival, or building worlds that look good and run great.

⚙️ Core Features
🚀 ModernFix, Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast: Cut RAM usage, boost FPS and eliminate lag spikes.

💨 FastQuit & Remove Reloading Screen: Spend less time waiting and more time playing.

👁 Iris Shaders + Entity Culling: Gorgeous shader support without melting your system. Visual clarity meets peak performance.

🧩 AppleSkin, Not Enough Crashes, Mod Menu: QOL tools for smarter, safer gameplay.

🔧 Cloth Config & Fabric API: Smooth configuration support.

🎨 EMF & ETF: Upgrade entity visuals with HD skin and model support — no performance hit.

👥 Essential Mod: Easy multiplayer and friends list system — no server needed.

📦 What You Get
A clean, minimal modpack that runs like vanilla — but better

Built-in shader support with Iris (includes preconfigured shaderpacks)

Full multi-version support (1.20.1–1.21.x instances)

Under 50MB total mod size

Perfect base for SMP or solo survival

Easy to build on top of — add your own mods and still keep things fast

UltraLight is your "install-and-go" optimization pack. No configs to mess with. No bloated extras. Just beautiful, fast Minecraft.

WARNING: Not all mods listed here are in all versions
